meridianScope.heading: Secure tomorrow's data against today's threats
meridianScope.hint: Drag, scroll, or use ← → keys to scan each security layer

layers.title: Lattice-based encryption
layers.description: CRYSTALS-Kyber and Dilithium algorithms resist Shor's algorithm — wrapping every payload in math that even fault-tolerant quantum computers cannot break at scale.
layers.alt: Encrypted data streams visualized as glowing lattice structures

layers.title: Quantum key distribution
layers.description: Photon-encoded keys travel across dedicated fiber links — any eavesdrop attempt collapses the quantum state and triggers instant revocation across the entire mesh.
layers.alt: Quantum communication network with photon beam pathways

layers.title: Homomorphic compute vaults
layers.description: Run analytics directly on ciphertext without ever decrypting — enabling collaborative AI on regulated health, finance, and defense datasets with zero plaintext exposure.
layers.alt: Secure vault processing encrypted data in a data center

layers.title: Zero-knowledge proof engine
layers.description: Prove compliance, identity, and asset ownership without revealing underlying data — SNARK and STARK circuits verify in milliseconds on commodity hardware.

layers.title: Post-quantum signatures
layers.description: SPHINCS+ and Falcon replace RSA and ECDSA across code signing, firmware, and document chains — future-proofing trust anchors before Y2Q migration deadlines.
layers.alt: Digital signature chain on blockchain ledger display

layers.title: Hardware entropy harvesting
layers.description: True random number generators sample quantum noise from chip junctions and atmospheric RF — seeding key material with entropy pools audited to NIST SP 800-90B.
layers.alt: Hardware security module generating random entropy
